plugins.name: screen-contract
plugins.description: Transforms any design input (Figma frame, screenshot, or text brief) into a structural JSON contract before any code generation.

plugins.name: write-handoff
plugins.description: Writes a HANDOFF.md for the current task with state, file references, verification commands, and next steps.

plugins.name: commit-guided
plugins.description: Universal guided git workflow to validate, commit, and open a PR with Conventional Commits.

plugins.name: sync-references
plugins.description: Audits, relinks, and synchronizes documentation references (README, llms.txt, AGENTS.md, SKILL.md, CHANGELOG.md) in a project.

plugins.name: figma-shadcn-hygiene
plugins.description: Figma-only structural hygiene pass: naming, taxonomy, auto layout, and token gaps, ready for handoff.

plugins.name: figma-shadcn-visual-match
plugins.description: Figma → shadcn → code pipeline with a visual fidelity gate: implements, screenshots, diffs, and iterates until approval.

plugins.name: career-boost
plugins.description: Diagnoses and rewrites resumes/LinkedIn profiles for ATS and recruiter impact, with fit scoring against a target job.

plugins.name: crisis-investing
plugins.description: Builds and scores investment strategies for global crisis scenarios (wars, pandemics, recessions, tail-risk events).

plugins.name: standardize-md-skills
plugins.description: Audits and standardizes SKILL.md and project MD files against Anthropic conventions, scoped to an explicit target directory.

plugins.name: ai-daily-brief
plugins.description: Generates a daily brief of top AI-world news, deduped across a curated source list.

plugins.name: security-auditor
plugins.description: Read-only audit of a Claude Code environment: secrets, permissions, config hygiene.
